title: Maintenance Assistant Engineer
description:
The person will be responsible for the maintenance of security systems of customer sites. He/She will ensure that any faults pertaining to the functional and operational aspects of the systems are being rectified based on the Service Level Requirement SLA.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Perform route Preventive Maintenance, patching and updates of the system.

  • Provide Corrective Maintenance works/activities for frontend devices such as access control readers, controllers, CCTV.  

  • Responsible for the deployed system functionalities and working condition at all times.

  • Perform fault rectifications, software enhancement, bug fixes, testing and commissioning to meet contractual requirements.

  • Working as a team to support operations, ensure optimum uptime and achieve business KPI.

  • Collate reports and checklist of PM works for billing purpose and CM works report for filing.

  • Prepare/updates service checklist.

  • Monitor of spare parts availability to support and meet downtime of system. Monitor of EOL/EOS of equipment installed

  • Co-ordinate with sub-contractors and customer on site matters, work schedule and quality of work.

  • Support Contract administration works (Ordering, billing milestone, O&M submission, Operation Manual submission, maintenance checklist and asset list)

  • Assist A&A work/ VO work for sites during maintenance cycle

  • Perform other job responsibilities as and when assigned.

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Engineering discipline preferably, in Electrical / IT industry, those with other engineering experiences are also welcome

  • At least 2 years of working experience in Maintenance industry, preferably in Physical Security System market. Those with project execution experience will be added advantage.

  • Able to be on standby for fault recall after office hours, based on rotation basis.

  • Knowledge in Security /Server System / Network equipment will be an added advantage.

  • Possess good analytical skills and ability to communicate with customers at all level.

  • The ability to work quickly and under pressure. Good problem-solving skills needed.

postedCompany.description: ST Electronics, the electronics arm of public listed Singapore Technologies Engineering Ltd (ST Engineering), delivers innovative system solutions to government, commercial, defence, and industrial customers worldwide. With a presence in more than 30 cities in 20 countries, ST Electronics markets its solutions to more than 100 countries internationally. It specialises in the design, development and integration of advanced electronics and communications systems, such as broadband radio frequency and satellite communication, e-Government solutions, information communications technologies and IT, rail and traffic management, real-time command and control, modelling and simulation, intelligent building management and information security.
postedCompany.name: ST ENGINEERING URBAN SOLUTIONS LTD.
